episode_0.hdf5: Upon detecting the equation 1+4 on the gray foam pad, first resolve the mathematical operation to compute the target value 5. Note the three horizontally aligned number cards beneath the equation: 5 appears on the left card, 0 is shown in the middle, and 6 is visible on the right card. Once the correct solution 5 aligns with the value on the left card, activate the gripper to close and proceed to move toward left.
